steps.title: Identify both owners
steps.content: The modeling belongs to multiple astronomers, so the plural possessive must be astronomers'. The trajectory belongs to one object, so the singular possessive must be object's.

steps.title: Reject incorrect possessives
steps.content: Choice A leaves both relationships nonpossessive. Choice B makes astronomer singular even though the context refers to astronomers. Choice C fixes object's but still leaves astronomers without the needed plural possessive apostrophe.

steps.title: Match plural and singular forms
steps.content: The phrase astronomers' modeling of the object's trajectory correctly shows plural ownership for the astronomers and singular ownership for the object. The answer is D.
